entries.name: Stanley Park
entries.description: 温哥华最大城市公园，海堤骑行与图腾柱地标。

reviews.text: World-class urban park right in Vancouver. The seawall walk and bike path offer stunning ocean and mountain views. Totem poles and the aquarium are absolute highlights.
温哥华必去城市公园！海堤单车道风景绝美，图腾柱超有历史感，强烈建议租自行车绕一圈，日落时分最美！
World-class urban park right in Vancouver. The seawall walk and bike path offer stunning ocean and mountain views. Totem poles and the aquarium are absolute highlights.
温哥华必去城市公园！海堤单车道风景绝美，图腾柱超有历史感，强烈建议租自行车绕一圈，日落时分最美！

entries.name: Granville Island Public Market
entries.description: 艺术家聚集的公共市场，本地海鲜与手工艺品云集。

reviews.text: Vancouver's vibrant public market with fresh local produce, artisan crafts, and incredible street food. The atmosphere on weekends is electric. A must-visit for foodies and shoppers.
温哥华最有活力的公共市场！本地海鲜超新鲜，手工艺品琳琅满目，街头表演随时上演，拍照圣地周末必打卡！
Vancouver's vibrant public market with fresh local produce, artisan crafts, and incredible street food. The atmosphere on weekends is electric. A must-visit for foodies and shoppers.
温哥华最有活力的公共市场！本地海鲜超新鲜，手工艺品琳琅满目，街头表演随时上演，拍照圣地周末必打卡！

entries.name: Capilano Suspension Bridge Park
entries.address: 3735 Capilano Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7R 4J1
entries.description: 137 米高空悬索桥横跨峡谷，林冠探险全年开放。

reviews.text: Thrilling experience high above the Capilano River. The Treetops Adventure and Cliffwalk extend the experience beyond the bridge. Worth every penny for a full day of adventure.
刺激又壮观！站在 137 米悬索桥上俯瞰峡谷令人窒息，林冠探险和悬崖步道也超好玩，门票含全套项目非常值！
Thrilling experience high above the Capilano River. The Treetops Adventure and Cliffwalk extend the experience beyond the bridge. Worth every penny for a full day of adventure.
刺激又壮观！站在 137 米悬索桥上俯瞰峡谷令人窒息，林冠探险和悬崖步道也超好玩，门票含全套项目非常值！

entries.name: Museum of Anthropology (MOA)
entries.address: 6393 NW Marine Dr, Vancouver, BC V6T 1Z2
entries.description: UBC 校园内人类学博物馆，馆藏原住民图腾与海达文化珍品。

reviews.text: World-renowned museum showcasing First Nations art and culture. The Great Hall with its towering totem poles is breathtaking. Thoughtfully curated and deeply moving exhibits throughout.
UBC 校园内的世界级博物馆！原住民图腾柱壮观震撼，展品背后的故事令人动容，强烈推荐学生和文化爱好者来参观！
World-renowned museum showcasing First Nations art and culture. The Great Hall with its towering totem poles is breathtaking. Thoughtfully curated and deeply moving exhibits throughout.
UBC 校园内的世界级博物馆！原住民图腾柱壮观震撼，展品背后的故事令人动容，强烈推荐学生和文化爱好者来参观！

entries.name: Grouse Grind
entries.address: 6400 Nancy Greene Way, North Vancouver, BC V7R 4K9
entries.description: 北温最陡硬核山径，853m 爬升仅 2.9km，缆车下山俯瞰温市全景。

reviews.text: The ultimate Vancouver fitness challenge — 853m elevation in 2.9km. Brutal but incredibly rewarding. Take the gondola down and grab a cold beer at the summit chalet.
温哥华最硬核的徒步挑战！全程上坡腿软但顶部景色无敌，爬完坐缆车下山，山顶喝一杯超满足，建议早上出发！
The ultimate Vancouver fitness challenge — 853m elevation in 2.9km. Brutal but incredibly rewarding. Take the gondola down and grab a cold beer at the summit chalet.
温哥华最硬核的徒步挑战！全程上坡腿软但顶部景色无敌，爬完坐缆车下山，山顶喝一杯超满足，建议早上出发！

entries.name: Lynn Peak Trail
entries.address: 3403 Boundary Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7H 2V7
entries.description: Lynn 峰中级步道 10.2km，印度湾全景俯瞰，原始雨林气息浓郁。

reviews.text: Fantastic moderate hike in Lynn Headwaters. The summit views of Indian Arm and the North Shore mountains are spectacular. Well-marked trail — bring plenty of water and layers.
北温隐藏精华步道！顶部印度湾全景视野令人震惊，难度适中，适合有一定体力的徒步爱好者，停车场早到为妙！

entries.trailhead: Lynn Headwaters Regional Park main parking lot

reviews.text: Fantastic moderate hike in Lynn Headwaters. The summit views of Indian Arm and the North Shore mountains are spectacular. Well-marked trail — bring plenty of water and layers.
北温隐藏精华步道！顶部印度湾全景视野令人震惊，难度适中，适合有一定体力的徒步爱好者，停车场早到为妙！

entries.name: Dog Mountain via Dinkey Peak
entries.address: 1700 Mt Seymour Rd, North Vancouver, BC V7G 1L3
entries.description: 西摩山高山草甸步道，开阔山脊俯瞰温哥华，秋叶红期景色最胜。

reviews.text: Beautiful subalpine meadow hike with panoramic Vancouver city views. Accessible in shoulder season. The open ridgeline section is stunning on clear days — highly recommend.
从山顶俯瞰温哥华全城太治愈了！高山草甸美不胜收，难度适中，晴天来视野无敌，强烈推荐秋天红叶季来！

entries.trailhead: Mt Seymour Provincial Park — Parking Lot 4

reviews.text: Beautiful subalpine meadow hike with panoramic Vancouver city views. Accessible in shoulder season. The open ridgeline section is stunning on clear days — highly recommend.
从山顶俯瞰温哥华全城太治愈了！高山草甸美不胜收，难度适中，晴天来视野无敌，强烈推荐秋天红叶季来！

entries.name: Quarry Rock (Deep Cove)
entries.address: Panorama Dr, North Vancouver, BC V7G 1V8
entries.description: Deep Cove 入门友好步道，3.7km 抵达绝美海湾观景台，下山吃甜甜圈是传统。

reviews.text: Perfect beginner-friendly hike with a stunning viewpoint over Deep Cove and Indian Arm. Only 3.7km but the payoff is massive. Grab a Honey Doughnuts in Deep Cove after — a local tradition.
入门级徒步首推！才 3.7 公里就能看到 Deep Cove 海湾全景，风景值爆表，下山后去 Deep Cove 吃甜甜圈是本地传统！

entries.trailhead: Deep Cove Park trailhead — Panorama Dr street parking

reviews.text: Perfect beginner-friendly hike with a stunning viewpoint over Deep Cove and Indian Arm. Only 3.7km but the payoff is massive. Grab a Honey Doughnuts in Deep Cove after — a local tradition.
